                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Under GEA-2 (Offered capacity of 200.000MW);

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Covered by valid WESC and COR.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Under Pre-development Stage

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             It can be noted that last 22 August 2024, GWEC applied for a new clearance for SIS but was denied
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             last 30 August 2024 as their capacity is originally 200.000MW but on their application it becomes
                                                                                                                                                  Northern                                                                                   304.000MW. GWEC was advised to provide in formal writing if they really intent to amend their
                                                                                                     San Isidro, Northern Samar and Calbayog
Gemini Wind Power Project                            Wind             Gemini Wind Energy Corp.                                                   Samar and     VIII        304.000             Nov-26                    Dec-26              capacty.
                                                                                                                    City, Samar
                                                                                                                                                   Samar
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             With request for an increase in project capacity from 200.000 MW to 304.000 MW. dated 25 Sep
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             2024

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             GWEC submitted document, the request for capacity amendment from 200.000MW to 304.000MW
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             is acceptable and has been reflected in the database.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Also, based on GWEC's August 2024 - Monthly report their target testing and commissioning date
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             becomes November 2026 from October 2026.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Under GEA-2 (Offered capacity of 152.000MW);
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Under Pre-Development Stage

                                                                                                    Maasin, Alimodian, Leon, San Miguel, Oton,                                                                                               On 19 September 2024, the assignment of WESC from Citicore Wind Energy Corporation (CWEC) to
Iloilo CW 1 Wind Power Project                       Wind             Citicore Wind Iloilo 1 Inc.                                                  Iloilo       VI         152.000             Nov-26                    Dec-26
                                                                                                                and Tigbauan, Iloilo                                                                                                         Citicore Wind Iloilo 1Inc. (CWI1I) was approved;

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             No. GEA2-W2023-10-010 from CWEC to CWI1I was approved.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             Under Pre-development Stage;

Notes:
TBD - To be determined
Renewable Energy (RE) Projects (Geothermal, Hydro, Biomass, Solar, and Wind) are updated as of 31 December 2025
IRESS - Integrated Renewable Energy and Energy Storage System

For inquiries, please contact the following:
DOE Electric Power Industry Management Bureau (EPIMB) for non-RE projects (coal, oil, natural gas,and BESS) - doe.epimb.powerprojects@gmail.com
DOE Renewable Energy Management Bureau (REMB) for RE Projects - remb9513@doe.gov.ph
